name: Risk difference of two arms (overall)
label: Risk difference + 95% CI
description: One overall risk difference (%) and 95% CI between the two treatment arms present in the data subset. The two arms are self-derived from the data (no arm-filter construct). References df_poptot so a 0-event subset still yields RD = 0 / CI = [0,0] (population_based; matches the fda-ae-t06 An_34 reference). Uses base stats::prop.test rather than cardx because cardx::ard_stats_prop_test is unsafe on a fully degenerate (0-event in both arms) 2x2 table. Verified against fda-ae-t06 Mth_03_1.
